issue_title: BF16 linear(matmul) operator 100x slower on odd matrix dimension sizes on A100
surface_reasoning: Priority 2: labeled `module: performance` + `module: cuda` + `module: cublas` + `module: linear algebra`. Title: 'BF16 linear(matmul) operator 100x slower on odd matrix dimension sizes on A100' — concrete 100x regression tied to matrix dimension parity on a specific GPU. Domain relevance: bf16 matmul on A100 uses cuBLAS tensor core kernels; 100x slowdown on odd dimensions indicates cuBLAS is falling back from a fast tensor-core path to a slow fallback kernel.
